code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  mut total = 0
  mut tok = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i <= n
    let is_end = i == n
    mut is_ws = false
    if is_end
      is_ws = true
    else
      let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        is_ws = true
      end
    end
    if is_ws
      if not string.is_empty(tok)
        let v = match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0
        end
        if v >= 0
          total = total + v
        else
          total = total - v
        end
        tok = ""
      end
    else
      let bb = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      tok = "#{tok}#{string.from_byte(bb)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("r=#{total}")
end
